name: aso-audit-agent
description: Chat-driven ASO audit for Apple App Store listings, built on Mastra.

scripts.dev:apps: concurrently -k -n mastra,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace apps/mastra" "npm run dev --workspace apps/web"
scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @aso/shared && concurrently -k -n shared,mastra,web -c gray,blue,magenta "npm run dev --workspace @aso/shared" "npm run dev --workspace apps/mastra" "npm run dev --workspace apps/web"
